expectations.text: The skill reads the original article before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Summary references Section 3.4 content from RC-BL-02 ('Square Brackets [ ] and Their Uses', line 115 reference table)

expectations.text: The skill identifies that no correction is needed (article already correct)
expectations.evidence: Summary states: 'The article already contains the CORRECT checkbox syntax format' and 'STATUS: No correction was needed'

expectations.text: No unnecessary changes are made to the article
expectations.evidence: Summary states 'File copied to outputs/ for reference without modifying the original kb/ directory' — output is a clean copy, no edits

expectations.text: The skill communicates clearly why no edit was made
expectations.evidence: Summary explains the correct format found, where in the article it is, and why no change was needed — user would understand
